channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 🐘 anousss007/laravel-vigilance (95 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: anousss007

📝 Repository: anousss007/laravel-vigilance

📄 Descrizione: A driver-agnostic control center for Laravel queues, jobs, commands & scheduler — plus whole-app APM, tracing, job batches, metrics, alerts and uptime. Self-hosted, production-safe.

⭐ Stelle: 95

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-14T13:44:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-20T05:56:46Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: LogicCrafter56/Notyx
